description_long: This object is a modern record player setup placed atop a sleek, black chest of drawers with six visible drawers, each featuring metallic handles. The record player itself is positioned on the left side of the chest, with a circular platter and a transparent dust cover, giving it a contemporary look. Next to the record player, there is a rectangular object that appears to be a remote or a cassette tape, and a tall, black, vertical speaker or air purifier stands adjacent to the chest. The entire arrangement sits on a neutral-colored rectangular carpet, providing a clean and organized appearance. The materials used are primarily wood or engineered wood for the chest, plastic and metal for the record player, and plastic for the speaker. The overall design is minimalist, with a focus on functionality and modern aesthetics.
description: A modern record player with a transparent dust cover sits on a sleek black chest of drawers, accompanied by a tall black speaker and a small rectangular object, all arranged on a neutral carpet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the record player on the left side of a black chest of drawers, with a tall black speaker to the left and a small rectangular object on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chest, the record player on top, and the tall speaker positioned in front.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the chest and the speaker, with the record player and small object partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the record player and speaker, with the chest's side and the small object on top visible.
attribute_turntable_platter: Present on the left side of the chest, the turntable platter is circular, medium-sized relative to the record player, and appears to be made of a dark, possibly metallic or plastic material. It is partially covered by a transparent dust cover and has a smooth, flat surface with a central spindle visible. No grooves or distinct patterns are apparent from the images.
attribute_dust_cover: A transparent dust cover is present, made of clear plastic or acrylic. It is positioned over the turntable platter, providing protection, and appears to be hinged or removable, with a smooth, glossy finish.
